meaning: n.雾警信号手,照顾牛马者
examples: The Smart Fog MS100 Fogger is the solution for optimal dust suppression.
With no moving parts in the fogger, you will have years of reliable low-maintenance operation.
Low Maintenance: The Smart Fog MS100 Fogger System's large 0.1 "orifice prevents clogging, even with hard water."
